name: lancedb
description: Codex plugin for building LanceDB pipelines in Python and TypeScript.

interface.shortDescription: Build LanceDB pipelines in Python and TypeScript.
interface.longDescription: Write, review, debug, and document LanceDB pipelines in Python and TypeScript that work across local LanceDB OSS tables and remote LanceDB Enterprise/Cloud tables, with idiomatic query/search patterns and performance defaults for ingestion, indexing, filtering, and diagnostics.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the LanceDB skill when writing, reviewing, debugging, or documenting LanceDB pipelines.
